name: hart_session

steps.catalog_description: Section heading with optional remarks (non-operational).
When session_nbr > 0, skip seed restore and continue at increment_session.
steps.description: Skip restore when already past seed; still increment the session.

steps.catalog_description: Restore STS from sts/backups/.
Advance session number by 1.

Snapshot in-train / assigned cars from the live database into this session's wheel report. Each call appends a new phase (Phase 1, Phase 2, …); optional Info labels the phase. Wheel-report phases are numbered independently of station reports.
steps.description: Wheel report — Starting.

steps.catalog_description: Snapshot cars by station from the live database into this session's station report. Each call appends a new phase (Phase 1, Phase 2, …); optional Info labels the phase (like Train Info on switch lists). Station-report phases are numbered independently of wheel reports.
steps.description: Station report — Starting.

steps.catalog_description: Complete offline load/unload (allows correcting bad setouts before industry completion).
Section heading with optional remarks (non-operational).
When true, skip forward to a later section. When false, continue to the next step.
steps.description: Skip CLEV when open COKE-CLEV-BULK (MR) orders >= 8.

steps.catalog_description: Auto-generate car orders.
steps.description: COKE-CLEV-BULK (McKees Rocks) when that shipment's open backlog is under gate.

steps.catalog_description: Section heading with optional remarks (non-operational).
When true, skip forward to a later section. When false, continue to the next step.
steps.description: Skip USS when open COKE-USS-BULK (MP) orders >= 8.

steps.catalog_description: Auto-generate car orders.
steps.description: COKE-USS-BULK (Mckeesport) when that shipment's open backlog is under gate.

steps.catalog_description: Section heading with optional remarks (non-operational).
Auto-generate car orders.
steps.description: Flow throttle: add up to 4 orders only while unfilled backlog is 40 or less. Skips are expected when backlog is high. COKE-* stayed out of AUTOMATIC (gated coke steps above).

steps.catalog_description: Auto-assign eligible cars to open orders (same as Fill Car Orders → Auto Assign). Uses car source checkboxes and optional order/car filters. Set Percent to limit how many orders are filled.
steps.description: Fill first so empties only fill traffic gaps.

steps.catalog_description: Reposition empty cars: send off-home cars home, or update with a chosen destination.
steps.description: Always reposition 25% after fill (winner: fill-then-reposition).

steps.catalog_description: Render printable waybills for open waybills.
Section heading with optional remarks (non-operational).
List #1 — morning D749: cars already in-train from prior Return. Print consist as-is.
steps.description: D749 — in-train overnight consist (morning).

steps.catalog_description: Set out cars from a job train. Choose Final Destination to spot each car at its loading or unloading location. Or pick a station / station-location to spot matching train cars there. Optional car filters match the Set Out Cars page. Leave job and location blank for all locals.
Pick up assigned cars onto a job train. Optional car filters match the Pick Up Cars page. Leave job blank for all locals (staging excluded).

Set out cars from a job train. Choose Final Destination to spot each car at its loading or unloading location. Or pick a station / station-location to spot matching train cars there. Optional car filters match the Set Out Cars page. Leave job and location blank for all locals.

Pick up assigned cars onto a job train. Job and location use checkbox dropdowns (multi-select, OR). Optional car filters match the Pick Up Cars page. Leave jobs unchecked for all locals (staging excluded).
Section heading with optional remarks (non-operational).

Assign eligible cars to selected job(s)/train(s). Hold Ctrl/Cmd to select multiple. Optional station filter limits to cars currently at one yard; optional destination filter limits to cars bound for a station/location (same tokens as Pickup final dest). Prefer destination-scoped assigns + Pick Up all over filtered pickups.
Print CK1 after NVL Return (end of shift). South setout follows weigh.
steps.description: CK1 switchlist — after NVL Return; independent of D749 leave.

steps.catalog_description: Pick up assigned cars onto a job train. Optional car filters match the Pick Up Cars page. Leave job blank for all locals (staging excluded).

Set out cars from a job train. Choose Final Destination to spot each car at its loading or unloading location. Or pick a station / station-location to spot matching train cars there. Optional car filters match the Set Out Cars page. Leave job and location blank for all locals.
Morning yard turn: assign at Scully, print Outbound, pick up, set out South. Does not begin the session already in-train.

Assign eligible cars to selected job(s)/train(s). Hold Ctrl/Cmd to select multiple. Optional station filter limits to cars currently at one yard; optional destination filter limits to cars bound for a station/location (same tokens as Pickup final dest). Prefer destination-scoped assigns + Pick Up all over filtered pickups.
steps.description: Assign NVL at Scully Yard for Neville Island, Shenango, South, McKeesport, Demmler.

steps.catalog_description: Assign remaining Island/Shenango deliveries still at South Yard (finish these setouts before Return homebound assigns).
steps.description: Assign NVL at South Yard for remaining Island/Shenango deliveries (before Return list).

steps.catalog_description: NVL Outbound — print assigned cars at Scully ready for pick-up (still in yard). Not an overnight in-train start (only D749 Starting is).
steps.description: NVL Outbound — switchlist before pick-up.

steps.catalog_description: Pick up all assigned NVL cars at SCULLY-YARD.

Set out cars from a job train. Choose Final Destination to spot each car at its loading or unloading location. Or pick a station / station-location to spot matching train cars there. Optional car filters match the Set Out Cars page. Leave job and location blank for all locals.
steps.description: Drop McKeesport / Demmler / South Yard cars at South.

steps.catalog_description: Set out remaining NVL cars at Final Destination (clear the train before Return assigns / snap).
steps.description: Set out Island and Shenango deliveries at Final Destination.

steps.catalog_description: Pick up remaining Island/Shenango deliveries at South Yard.
After NVL Outbound: Shenango pickup, calibrate/weigh on CK1, then South Yard setout. NVL Return runs after D749 Return.
Pick up assigned cars onto a job train. Optional car filters match the Pick Up Cars page. Leave job blank for all locals (staging excluded).

Recalibrate the coke track scale. Performs a fresh random calibration when required (first use / out of service) or when the configured number of sessions have elapsed since the last calibration. Set to 1 to calibrate every session (steady ~15% reload routing); higher values let scale drift accumulate so more cars route to reload between calibrations. Run this before the Track Scale weigh step.
Weigh loaded cars on a job train (or at the scale) for the selected commodity. Uses track scale config when commodity is blank.
Weighed coke lands at South after D749 Starting — reload order is a surprise.
Same-session return of scale reloads from South to Shenango so HM hoppers clear before the next session.
Assign CK1 at South for COKE-RELOAD-SHEN / Shenango-bound cars after weigh.
steps.description: Assign CK1 at South for Shenango reloads.

steps.catalog_description: CK1 Return — South reload lift back to Shenango.
steps.description: CK1 Return — South reloads to Shenango.

steps.catalog_description: Pick up Shenango-bound reload cars at South onto CK1.
steps.description: Pick up Shenango reloads at South.

steps.catalog_description: Spot CK1 Return reload cars at Shenango shipping tracks.
steps.description: Set out reloads at SHEN-COKE-SHIPPING.

steps.catalog_description: Section heading with optional remarks (non-operational).

Assign eligible cars to selected job(s)/train(s). Hold Ctrl/Cmd to select multiple. Optional station filter limits to cars currently at one yard; optional destination filter limits to cars bound for a station/location (same tokens as Pickup final dest). Prefer destination-scoped assigns + Pick Up all over filtered pickups.
steps.description: Assign STG-DEMMLER (all stations, including McKeesport).

steps.catalog_description: Print Demmler staging cars (blank title keeps STG-DEMMLER separate from D749 / D749 Return).
steps.description: STG-DEMMLER switchlist.

steps.catalog_description: Pick up assigned cars onto a job train. Optional car filters match the Pick Up Cars page. Leave job blank for all locals (staging excluded).
Only McKeesport industry deliveries — Final Destination.
Yard-ready cars for D749 at Demmler (not FD to Island/South).
One list: South MP/Dem lift + Demmler overnight (next-day) consist. Print D749 Return, then work South→Demmler and overnight pick up.
Assign D749 overnight leave traffic at Demmler Yard.
steps.description: Assign D749 overnight at Demmler Yard.

steps.catalog_description: Pick up assigned cars onto a job train. Job and location use checkbox dropdowns (multi-select, OR). Optional car filters match the Pick Up Cars page. Leave jobs unchecked for all locals (staging excluded).
Assign D749 at South for McKeesport/Demmler (dropped by NVL Outbound / available at South).
steps.description: Assign D749 at South for McKeesport/Demmler.

steps.catalog_description: D749 Return — South MP/Dem cars + Demmler overnight assigns on one list.
steps.description: D749 Return — South lift + overnight on one list.

steps.catalog_description: Return: finish Island/Shenango deliveries, NI work, homebound to Scully. Shenango = setout deliveries only; empties can ride back (no Shenango pickup).

Assign eligible cars to selected job(s)/train(s). Hold Ctrl/Cmd to select multiple. Optional station filter limits to cars currently at one yard; optional destination filter limits to cars bound for a station/location (same tokens as Pickup final dest). Prefer destination-scoped assigns + Pick Up all over filtered pickups.
steps.description: Assign NVL at Neville Island for island work, homebound Scully/MR, and McKeesport/Demmler cars that drop at South before Scully.

steps.catalog_description: Assign NVL at South Yard for homebound (Scully/MR/CSX) — not island deliveries.
steps.description: Assign NVL at South Yard for homebound (Scully/MR/CSX) — not island deliveries.

steps.catalog_description: NVL Return — print after island final-dest setouts; homebound still at South / on train for Scully park.
steps.description: NVL Return — NI pickup (incl. MP/Dem for South drop) + South homebound assigns. Shenango is deliver-only.

steps.catalog_description: Pick up all assigned NVL cars at Neville Island.
Drop McKeesport / Demmler / South Yard cars at South before homebound continues to Scully.
steps.description: Drop McKeesport / Demmler / South Yard cars at South.

steps.catalog_description: Set out remaining NVL cars at Final Destination (clear the train before Return assigns / snap).
steps.description: Set out remaining Island / Shenango deliveries at Final Destination.

steps.catalog_description: Pick up assigned cars onto a job train.
steps.description: Pick up homebound Scully / McKees Rocks cars at South.

steps.catalog_description: Park remaining Return cars at Scully Yard.
steps.description: Park remaining Return cars at Scully Yard.

steps.catalog_description: Section heading with optional remarks (non-operational).

Assign eligible cars to selected job(s)/train(s). Hold Ctrl/Cmd to select multiple. Optional station filter limits to cars currently at one yard; optional destination filter limits to cars bound for a station/location (same tokens as Pickup final dest). Prefer destination-scoped assigns + Pick Up all over filtered pickups.
Print Scully staging cars as NVL Outbound (title override consolidates under NVL).
steps.description: NVL Outbound — STG-SCULLY cars printed under NVL.

steps.catalog_description: Pick up assigned cars onto a job train. Optional car filters match the Pick Up Cars page. Leave job blank for all locals (staging excluded).
Only McKees Rocks industry work — Final Destination.
Park Island/Shenango/South/McKeesport-bound at Scully for NVL — never FD to Island.
Section heading with optional remarks (non-operational).

Snapshot cars by station from the live database into this session's station report. Each call appends a new phase (Phase 1, Phase 2, …); optional Info labels the phase (like Train Info on switch lists). Station-report phases are numbered independently of wheel reports.
steps.description: Station report — End of session.

steps.catalog_description: Snapshot in-train / assigned cars from the live database into this session's wheel report. Each call appends a new phase (Phase 1, Phase 2, …); optional Info labels the phase. Wheel-report phases are numbered independently of station reports.
steps.description: Wheel report — End of session.

steps.catalog_description: Export current DB to sts/backups/{prefix}{session_nbr} and copy RollingStock photos to {prefix}{session_nbr}_photos. Overwrites any prior dump with that name. Use a stable prefix (e.g. hart_session) so each session writes hart_session1, hart_session2, … Lock from the session overview for a static *_locked checkpoint.
steps.description: End-of-session dump as hart_session{N} (+ photos).

steps.catalog_description: Section heading with optional remarks (non-operational).

description: Cal-fix baseline: max_new=4 gate=40 repo=25 fill=100 coke open CLEV>=8 USS>=8 bulk 2-3 + CK1 Return + B2 + cal/orphan fixes | NVL Return after D749 Return
